title: Nujum Pak Belalang
actors: P. Ramlee, Bad Latiff, Hashimah Yon
plot: Based on a Malay folklore, this movie tells the story of Pak Belalang and his son who conspire to portray the latter as an astrologer in an attempt to help out fellow villagers in trouble. Convinced by his actions, the Penghulu (M...
